_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes - detailed history, signs & symptoms, indication for procedure
Was the patient admitted with symptoms of Inability to pass flatus, detention of stomach, pain in abdomen etc.?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and line of treatment?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?
Was the Intra-operative clinical photograph submitted?

common_queries: Patient was not admitted with symptoms such as history of fever, vomiting, abdominal pain, distension of stomach, or inability to pass flatus.
Clinical notes are missing, incomplete, or do not detail history, signs, symptoms, or indication for procedure.
X-ray abdomen (erect posture) is missing at pre-authorization.
Indoor Case Papers (ICPs) with daily vitals and line of treatment are missing or incomplete at claim submission.
Discharge summary is missing or does not include follow-up advice.

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed with Ileostomy / Resection Anastomosis/ Exploratory Laparotomy only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation and investigations.
